title: Native image I/O — Windows via GDI+
goal: Implement the Windows backend for the image-I/O dispatch table defined in ESH-0006. Uses GDI+ Image / Bitmap / Graphics — native to Windows, ships with the OS, requires only Gdiplus.lib.
next_actions: lib/core/image_io_windows.cpp: implement the three function-pointer slots using GDI+ Image::FromFile / Bitmap::LockBits / Graphics::DrawImage.
Read: Gdiplus::Image::FromFile + LockBits to extract a uint8_t* buffer.
Write: Bitmap from buffer + Save with the appropriate CLSID (PNG / JPEG / BMP / WebP — verify WebP CLSID availability; fall back to PNG conversion if not present).
Wire into CMakeLists.txt: WIN32 branch links Gdiplus.lib and selects this .cpp file.
Add tests/v1_3_edge_cases/image_io_windows_test.esk: same shape as the Darwin/Linux tests.
acceptance: lib/core/image_io_windows.cpp provides read/write/resize matching the contract.
Windows build links Gdiplus.lib; no deps/stb.
verification: ssh jack-blupc 'cd src/eshkol && cmake --build build-jack-msys-ucrt --target eshkol-run'
